description_long: This decorative flower arrangement features a blue-and-white ceramic bowl filled with a variety of plant elements. Tall, orange-tipped tulip-like flowers rise from the center, surrounded by green, mossy spheres and spiky, round cacti. A prominent, textured piece of brown driftwood or bark stands upright in the middle, adding vertical interest and a naturalistic touch. Succulent rosettes and a white, stylized flower accent are nestled among the greenery, while thin, pale branches extend outward, creating a sense of movement. The overall composition is lush and visually dynamic, with a harmonious blend of textures and colors.
description: A lush, mixed flower arrangement in a blue-and-white ceramic bowl, featuring tall orange tulips, cacti, succulents, and driftwood.
description_view_0: Front view shows the driftwood centerpiece, orange tulips, green moss balls, cacti, and a white flower accent in a blue-and-white bowl.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cluster of tulips, succulents, and moss balls, with the driftwood partially obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with driftwood, tulips, cacti, and the white flower accent visible, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focuses on the stems of the tulips, moss balls, and cacti, with the driftwood mostly hidden.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, with overlapping layers forming a cup-like structure typical of tulips.
